jsonLd.title: Myntra is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
